title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.716 - Treatment court commissioner position
text:
478.716.  Treatment court commissioner position. — Beginning January 1, 2007, there is hereby created a state-funded treatment court commissioner position in the forty-second judicial circuit.
(L. 2005 S.B. 420 & 344 § 4, A.L. 2018 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 2) 
Effective 12-18-18
